title: Locum Tenens Onboarding Checklist
subtitle: Slash locum onboarding time without sacrificing compliance standards
description: Stop losing coverage windows to slow credentialing. This checklist ensures NALTO-aligned vetting, accelerates onboarding, and gets qualified locums on your floor—protecting revenue and patient care.
bullets: Reduce credentialing timeline from 14 days to 3 days
Verify NALTO status, licenses, and malpractice records instantly
Cut credential verification admin work by 85 percent
Fill same-day gaps without 35 percent agency markups

title: Locum Tenens Rate Guide 2026
subtitle: What you should pay for licensed locum tenens staffing in 2026
description: Get current locum tenens rates by specialty and state to help your facility negotiate contracts and budget staffing gaps with confidence using NALTO-backed market data.
bullets: Nine specialties across all U.S. states: hourly and daily rates
NALTO-credentialed agency benchmarks to evaluate vendor partnership costs
Metropolitan and rural pricing tiers for accurate region-based budgeting
Benchmark comparison reveals if your rates exceed market standard

title: Locum Tenens Vetting Guide
subtitle: Verify Locum Credentials Fast—Without Missing Red Flags
description: Screen locum candidates against DEA registries, state medical boards, malpractice databases, and NALTO credentials in minutes—ensuring safe placements without delays that leave units understaffed.
bullets: Screen against all 50 state medical board databases instantly
Catch disciplinary actions, malpractice claims, and lapsed DEA registration
Verify NALTO membership and active professional liability insurance
Eliminate credential gaps before they become liability risks
